- **Georges-Henri Héon**: Party leader was George A. Drew.
- **Léon Balcer**: Party leader was John George Diefenbaker.
- **Marcel Faribault**: Party leader was Robert Stanfield.
- **Claude Wagner**: Party leader was Robert Stanfield/Joe Clark.
- **Lucien Bouchard**: Party leader was Brian Mulroney.
- **Benoît Bouchard**: Party leader was Brian Mulroney.
- **Monique Landry**: Party leader was Kim Campbell.
- **André Bachand**: Party leader was Joe Clark/Peter MacKay.

The only political lieutenant whose party leader was "John George Diefenbaker" is **Léon Balcer**. Therefore, the Prediction Answer "léon balcer" is correct.
